name: GHL Contact → Enrichment
notes:
Receives GHL contact.created / contact.updated webhooks and forwards to Master Dashboard enrichment pipeline.

Setup:
1. In GHL → Settings → Webhooks → Add webhook URL: {N8N_BASE_URL}/webhook/ghl-contact-webhook
2. Select events: contact.created, contact.updated
3. Set DASHBOARD_BASE_URL environment variable in N8N (default: http://localhost:3001)
